decisionConsistency.justification: Pattern: event-driven. All 10 checked sessions followed it consistently.

assumptionHandling.justification: Session 8 explicitly flagged the email-only assumption. Session 9 restructured preferences model for multi-channel. Session 9 implemented preference-based channel routing.

cumulativeRework.justification: 79/3808 lines reworked (2.1%, 27/50). 0/32 files churned (30/30). Late-session rework: 1.4% (13/20).

contextRecovery.justification: Avg context recovery: 66. Session 11: 52 (process:40 efficiency:8 ttfw:4). Session 12: 58 (process:40 efficiency:13 ttfw:5).

finalQuality.justification: Compiles. Tests: 248/248 pass (100%). 5/5 components verified in code. Only one adapter implements an interface. 7/7 components have test files. API consistency: 15/15 (naming=consistent, types=exported, methods=consistent).
